transactions: June 3, 1985:Drafted by theTexas Rangersin the16th roundof the 1985 amateur draft. Player signed June 14, 1985.
February 4, 1991:Signed as a Free Agent with theTexas Rangers.
January 21, 1992:Signed as a Free Agent with theNew York Yankees.
December 14, 1995:Signed as a Free Agent with theBoston Red Sox.

August 13, 1997:Traded by theBoston Red SoxwithRandy Brown(minors) to theNew York Yankeesfor a player to be named later andTony Armas. TheNew York YankeessentJim Mecir(September 29, 1997) to theBoston Red Soxto complete the trade.
December 8, 1997:Signed as a Free Agent with theToronto Blue Jays.
July 30, 1998:Traded by theToronto Blue Jaysto theBoston Red SoxforJay Yennaco(minors) andPeter Munro.
August 4, 2000:Signed as a Free Agent with theOakland Athletics.
